steps.title: Use the tangent ratio
steps.content:
In a right triangle, tangent compares the side opposite the angle to the side adjacent to the angle.
$$
\tan x^\circ=\frac{\text{opposite}}{\text{adjacent}}
$$

steps.title: Substitute the side lengths
steps.content: From the figure, the side opposite $x^\circ$ is $26$, and the adjacent side is $7$. $$ \tan x^\circ=\frac{26}{7} $$ The answer is C.
